the border-checkpoint dramaturgy, the gate's voice, the prompts, the stamps, and the self-test sentences are fiction by this studio
transforms-detection-mechanism-into-disclosed-reconstruction
transformation_band.rationale: The meter on this page is NOT GPTZero, Turnitin, or any commercial detector. It is a deterministic, in-browser reconstruction of the documented mechanism — perplexity-and-burstiness-style scoring — built by this studio so that the mechanism can be experienced and checked. Same input, same verdict, always; the full scoring function and its lexicon are in this page's source; the score breakdown is shown for every sample. Its verdict proves nothing about you. The verified figures above prove the pattern at population scale.

transformation_band.label: declines-to-carry
transformation_band.rationale: A work about machine judgment may not borrow stakes the record does not attribute to the machine
transformation_band.local_epistemic_status: BOUNDARY CASE — DELIBERATELY NOT CARRIED ON THE VERDICT CARD

obligations.clause_text: Live status travels with every derived operation, at equal prominence to the derived headline — not a status frozen at the moment of translation.

A re-voiced or re-cooked piece must preserve the caveat its source work's own README names as load-bearing — re-voicing compresses, and compression is where a load-bearing caveat is dropped for pace, not from bad intent.
